node.statement: (Computing the gap for key algebras). (i) A = C(X) abelian: Spec = {0, 1, 2, ...}, G = ∅ (measures supported on k points give dim = k - 1). (ii) A = M_n(C): Spec = {d²-1 : 1 ≤ d ≤ n} = {0, 3, 8, 15, ...}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (iii) A = B(H) inf-dim: Spec = {0, 3, 8, 15, ...} ∪ {∞}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (iv) A = M_2(C) ⊕ M_2(C): Spec = {0, 3, 7}, G ⊇ {1, 2}. (v) Group C*-algebra C*(Γ): Spec depends on the dual Γ̂ (set of irreducible representations); Gap varies with the group.
